provenance.verification_result: 404 of 404 local FLAC files are byte-identical to the corresponding files in the source archive.
provenance.license_note: The OSF project does not declare a license in its metadata; do not infer a reuse license from the article's CC BY license.

related_official_materials.name: IRIS Sound stimuli
related_official_materials.relationship: Its 404 task-specific MP3 files are byte-identical to the four task-specific MP3 ZIP archives in OSF bkj6v, but they are not byte-identical to this FLAC stimulus set.

aggregate_algorithm: For tasks in the listed order and files in numeric order: SHA-256(relative POSIX path + NUL + raw 32-byte SHA-256 of file contents).
notes: The digests identify the exact local bytes and the provenance check establishes identity with the official OSF offline distribution; neither establishes acoustic equivalence with the stimuli described in any article.
Observed ramp values are rounded waveform-audit results for 1.flac, not metadata embedded in the FLAC files. See PROCEDURE_AUDIT.md for the method and interpretation.

The article description, the OSF offline FLAC archive, and the task-specific MP3 archives in the same OSF project contain mutually inconsistent stimulus specifications. The local FLAC files must not be overwritten to reconcile those sources.
